Video.summary: Sonny Side discovers the miracle in India, goes on a food tour in Jodhpur, and sees street food in Vietnam.
Video.title: S01E01

Video.summary: Sonny Side experiences a twisted American barbecue, finds exotic food in Isfahan City, and catches a super rare Kenyan village feast on camera for the first time.
Video.title: S02E23

Video.summary: Sonny Side eats shocking Indian food, Japan's most prized fish and rare countryside foods, and India's taboo and never-before-seen street foods.
Video.title: S02E24

Video.summary: Sonny Side tries Viagra oysters and vietnames sandwiches, boils 600 pounds of pig parts in Louisiana, and finds Mississippi's strangest food combo.
Video.title: S02E25

Video.summary: Sonny Side catches and cooks rare Japanese alien fish, feeds twenty-five people with one goose while in Madagascar, and embarks on a Kenyan meat tour in Nairobi that leads to boiled cow head.
Video.title: S02E26

Video.summary: Sonny Side tries bizarre Balinese foods no tourist has seen before, experiences an epic Eid feast, and catches and cooks Florida's most dangerous killer.
Video.title: S02E27
